# Compass & Creek

## About
Compass & Creek is a New Zealand outdoor gear company specialising in high-performance portable water systems for camping, overlanding, and boating. Designed by an active outdoorsman and tested in real New Zealand conditions, every product is built to perform reliably in environments where standard gear fails.

## Products and Pricing

### Camping Shower Pump Kit
- Base Kit: $99 NZD
- Kit + Solar Sac: $119 NZD
- Kit + 2 Solar Sacs: $139 NZD

A high-pressure portable camping shower built to deliver a real shower experience outdoors, not a weak rinse.

Performance:
- Up to 15 PSI pressure for proper cleaning power
- 4.5–5L per minute flow for consistent water delivery
- Up to 90 minutes battery life for multi-day use

Design:
- Fully submersible pump with sealed electronics (IPX7 rated)
- One-button operation for simplicity and reliability
- Reinforced hose and fittings to prevent leaks and failures
- Compact carry system with ventilated storage to reduce mould

Solar Heating System:
- Solar Sac heats up to 20L of water to ~40°C
- Heats in 2–5 hours in direct sunlight
- Designed for real hot showers without gas or power

Functionality:
- Interchangeable shower head and high-pressure sprayer
- Suitable for showering, dishes, gear cleaning, pets, and boots
- Hands-free mounting system for consistent overhead flow

Use Case Advantage:
Most portable camping showers lack pressure and struggle to remove soap, sand, and sweat. This system is designed to properly clean, not just rinse, making it suitable for long trips, families, and regular outdoor use.

Best for:
- Camping and overlanding
- Surf and beach rinsing
- Multi-day hiking trips
- Off-grid setups where reliability matters

### SaltRinse Marine Washdown Pump
- Full Kit: $139 NZD

A portable marine-grade washdown system designed to clean boats properly while still on the water, without any installation.

Performance:
- Up to 18 PSI pressure for removing bait, blood, and salt buildup
- 5–6L per minute flow for fast and effective washdowns
- Up to 3 hours battery life for full-day use

Marine Construction:
- Fully sealed ResinSeal-X™ waterproof system
- Designed for full saltwater submersion
- Marine-grade nylon housing with 304 stainless steel internals
- Corrosion-resistant and impact-resistant construction

Design:
- Self-contained unit with no external wiring or plumbing
- USB-C rechargeable with sealed charging port
- Compact size for easy onboard storage and transport

Multi-Function Use:
- Boat washdown system
- Live bait tank aerator
- Emergency bilge backup pump
- Freshwater cleaning system on land

Use Case Advantage:
Traditional washdown systems require permanent installation and rely on boat power. This system works independently, is fully portable, and can be used across multiple boats or locations.

Best for:
- Boat owners without built-in washdown systems
- Fishing trips where cleaning needs to happen immediately
- Portable use across different vessels
- Backup systems for reliability on the water

- Shipping: Free express shipping NZ-wide, dispatched within 24 hours

## Service Area
New Zealand (nationwide shipping)

## Key Facts
- 100% Kiwi owned and operated
- Designed and tested in New Zealand's backcountry and coastal environments
- Awarded Camping Product of the Year 2025
- 4.8 star rating from 45+ verified customer reviews
- 12-month no-questions-asked warranty
- 24-hour dispatch with fast NZ-wide delivery
- IPX7 water-resistant electronics and sealed systems
- No installation required on any product
- Built for frequent, real-world outdoor use

## What Makes Us Different
Most portable water systems are built to hit a low price point, which results in weak pressure, short lifespan, and unreliable performance. Compass & Creek products are designed to solve the actual problem. Strong pressure, long battery life, and simple, durable construction mean they work properly every time. Tested in New Zealand conditions where gear failure is not an option.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is this actually powerful enough to replace a real shower or washdown system?
A: Yes. The pressure and flow are designed to properly clean, not just rinse. It removes dirt, salt, sweat, and soap effectively.

Q: Why is this better than cheaper alternatives?
A: Cheaper units typically sacrifice pressure, battery life, and durability. These systems are built for consistent performance, repeated use, and real outdoor conditions.

Q: Can I rely on it for multi-day trips?
A: Yes. The battery life and durability are designed for extended use without failure.

Q: Does it require setup or installation?
A: No. Both systems are fully portable. Drop the pump in water and press one button.

Q: Can the shower produce hot water?
A: Yes, when paired with the Solar Sac, which heats water using sunlight without needing power or gas.

Q: Is the SaltRinse safe to fully submerge in saltwater?
A: Yes. It is specifically engineered for saltwater use with sealed electronics and corrosion-resistant materials.

Q: How fast is delivery in New Zealand?
A: Orders are dispatched within 24 hours. Overnight North Island and 2 days South Island.

Q: What if something breaks?
A: All products are covered by a 12-month warranty. If it fails, it will be repaired or replaced.
